html:
Exclusive to:

“Stores 3 slots of items, and can be sent to explored areas of the map.

WX-78 gave this drone the name of Drew.”

-

The Portable Storage Unit is a delivery drone that can be crafted by WX-78 with the Transport I skill. It can be deployed on the ground and has 3 slots to store items. Any characters can access the items inside but only WX-78 with the required skill can send it. The Portable Storage Unit can travel to any explored area on the map.

To send the Portable Storage Unit, place items inside it and right-click the Unit. The map will open, allowing the player to left-click any explored location to deliver the drone there. Care should be taken when choosing a destination, as the Portable Storage Unit can sometimes become stuck inside large structures and become inaccessible.

When no items inside, WX-78 can right-click to dismantle it. Other characters have to use hammer to return it to item form.

Contents

  • 1 Large Portable Storage Unit
  • 2 Skins
    • 2.1 Small
    • 2.2 Large
  • 3 Tips
  • 4 Trivia
  • 5 Assets

Large Portable Storage Unit

“Stores 6 slots of items, and can be sent to explored areas of the map.

WX-78 gave this drone the name of Drew.”

-

WX-78 with Transport II skill can craft Large Portable Storage Unit that has 6 slots. The Large Portable Storage Unit has the same recipe and the same function as the smaller one.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Small

Woven - Distinguished
Jeweled Collection
Rococo Courier
A mechanical overlord's treasures demand delivery in due style.
Woven - Distinguished
Gothic Collection
Dark Delivery Drone
Appropriately coffin-shaped for the lifeless possessions of a soulless being.

Large

Rococo Courier
A mechanical overlord's treasures demand delivery in due style.

(associated with: )
Dark Delivery Drone
Appropriately coffin-shaped for the lifeless possessions of a soulless being.

(associated with: )

Tips

  • The W.O.B.O.T. and W.I.N.bot can put items into deployed Portable Storage Unit while Auto-Grabber does not.
  • The Portable Storage Units work well with the Remote Transfer skill as transferring to Backup Chassis does not transfer the inventory, and the Portable Storage Units can deliver player's items to target location.

Trivia

  • The Portable Storage Unit is added in WX-78 Skill Spotlight update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thiết bị lưu trữ di động là máy bay không người lái giao hàng có thể được chế tạo bởi WX-78 với kỹ năng Vận chuyển I. Nó có thể được triển khai trên mặt đất và có 3 khe để chứa vật phẩm. Bất kỳ nhân vật nào cũng có thể truy cập các vật phẩm bên trong nhưng chỉ WX-78 với kỹ năng cần thiết mới có thể gửi nó. Thiết bị lưu trữ di động có thể di chuyển đến bất kỳ khu vực nào được khám phá trên bản đồ.
